paper_title: Sediment Sampling and Correlational Analysis in Qaidam Basin Lakes

methods.description: This method describes the process of collecting sediment samples from six lakes in the Qaidam Basin and preparing them for analysis. The purpose is to obtain sediment samples for trace element analysis.

steps.description: 57 sediment samples were sampled from the six previously identified lakes using a grab sampler.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples using a grab sampler

steps.description: Sediment with a thickness of 4-10 cm on the surface layer was obtained, sealed in a polyethylene bag, and stored in a refrigerator back to the laboratory for treatment.
steps.searchable_summary: store sediment samples in polyethylene bags and refrigerate

steps.description: During the pre-treatment process, the weeds and stones in the sediment were removed, and the sediment was freeze-dried using a freeze dryer.
steps.searchable_summary: remove debris and freeze-dry sediment samples

steps.description: The sediment was ground with an agate mortar and passed through a 100-mesh nylon sieve.
Approximately 0.3 g of sediment was microwave-digested with a mixture of 8 mL HCl, 2 mL HNO3, and 2 mL HF.
steps.searchable_summary: microwave-digest sediment samples with acid mixture

steps.description: An acid distilling instrument was used to distill the acid at 160°C, and when there was 2-3 mL of liquid remaining, 2 mL HClO4 was added.
The solution in the digestion tube was transferred to a centrifuge tube and rinsed with ultrapure water.
The contents of V, Cr, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ba, Tl, Cd, Pb, and U were analyzed using ICP-MS and ICP-OES.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze trace elements using ICP-MS and ICP-OES

methods.description: This method involves analyzing the correlation between trace elements in sediment samples from the lakes to understand their geochemical relationships and potential sources.

steps.description: The correlation between the elements of the selected lakes in the study area is presented in a chart.
steps.searchable_summary: create correlation chart for trace elements

steps.description: The correlation coefficient matrix of the six lakes was analyzed to determine the strength of correlations between elements.
A violin plot with a box was employed as a visual display for the basic statistics of element contents in plateau lake sediment samples.
steps.searchable_summary: create violin plot for element content statistics
